Gonzalo Higuain arrives at AC Milan with the onerous loan formula until June 30, 2019 with the right of redemption.

Mattia Caldara finally arrives as part of the exchange transaction on a par with Leonardo Bonucci, who returns to Juventus. The 24-year-old defender has signed a contract that binds him to AC Milan until 30 June 2023.

The Club will dedicate the whole day tomorrow to the presentation to the press and to the fans of the two newcomers, according to the following program:

In the morning, physical tests at Milanello, with the MilanLab staff;
h 12.00, visit to the Mondo Milan Museum and the Casa Milan Store;
2.00 pm, presentation press conference;
4.30 pm, TV / photo set and greeting to the fans in Piazza del Duomo, "Giacomo Arengario" terrace.
The press conference will be held at 2.00 pm at Casa Milan, in via Aldo Rossi 8, with live coverage on the Club Channel "Milan TV", "live streaming" in Italian on and in English on.
